subparts.text: List the key characteristics of wireless channels. 2.5
Discuss IEEE 802.15 standard and its working groups. 2.5
Describe in brief the path finding process in Cluster Head Gateway Switch routing protocol. 2.5
Discuss the types of routing protocols based on routing information update mechanism. 2.5
Discuss the key features of Ad-hoc networks and how they differ from traditional wireless networks. 5
A university wants to implement a wireless network for its campus. The network must support both indoor and outdoor connectivity. Design a solution and briefly discuss the challenges. 5
How does Location-Aided Routing improve efficiency over traditional flooding? 5
Analyze the challenges in designing a routing protocol for Ad- hoc wireless network. 5
Describe in detail any one hybrid routing protocol. 5
